1.description: Prevalence of misclassified loans The figure depicts the number of correctly classified and misclassified originations from the +/–5% sample.

2.description: Replication of O&Kfigure 2a The figure reproduces O&K’s figure 2a (left) and our replication (right). The original figure shows a high count of applications just above the limit, which is not realistic. Our replication shows that the count of applications just above the limit is very low, as expected.
